message:
feat(completion): Add completion detection for agent work monitoring (bd-25cq)

Implement CompletionDetector to detect when agents complete their assigned beads:

- Watch(ctx) returns channel of CompletionEvents for continuous monitoring
- CheckNow(pane) for immediate single-pane checks
- Multiple detection methods: bead status polling, pattern matching, idle detection
- Graceful degradation when br CLI unavailable
- Event deduplication with configurable window
- Integration with AssignmentStore (marks completed/failed automatically)
- Handles pane loss (agent crash detection)

Tests: 15 unit tests covering patterns, timing, and edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
